smoke.detail: Parser unit tests green on laptop (9 passed, box smoke deselected): parse_preds turns the format-faithful sample preds.txt into 14 valid OutputRecords (2 molecules x 7 endpoints), Conf_index populated as DIRECT uncertainty on every record, AD/AD_index/NaN handled, header-driven parser tolerates a _predRange build. Real box MCR smoke on FTO-43 SKIPPED: OPERA is out-of-band (MATLAB MCR + Java) and the runtime is not installed on the box (no OPERA_HOME/MCR_ROOT, no /opt/MATLAB or /zfs opera install found).

note: Parser + README recipe done; MCR/Java runtime install on the box is the residue -> needs_aaran (not blocked). No pixi env (env_manifest=None, out-of-band); registry already correct.
